rows.owner_action: Run lead form and importability audits before treating Contact or keepsake requests as structured leads.
rows.evidence_required: configured/rendered forms and importable sample texts must report issues=0.

rows.owner_action: For each real Contact or keepsake email, copy only the LoveTypes structured request block into a temporary text file.
rows.evidence_required: source, guardian, intake_type, reply email presence, consent and utm_content parsing all visible in check output.

rows.owner_action: Write back only real requests with explicit reply consent and a traceable proof note; never store raw email in the CSV.
rows.command: python3 tools/promotion_lead_text_import.py add --input /path/to/request.txt --proof-note "email thread Gmail request checked 2026-06-20"
rows.evidence_required: lead-intake-tracker.csv gains one real row, and matched utm_content increments the mapped KPI field.

rows.owner_action: Refresh evidence and demand gates before deciding whether to build a free asset, Luna pack, or offer experiment.
rows.evidence_required: real leads have traceable evidence and explicit consent; repeated guardian demand reaches the threshold before any offer build.

rows.owner_action: If structured text parsing fails, use guardian-specific command examples from lead-writeback-playbook.md after manual validation.
rows.command: python3 tools/promotion_lead_writeback.py add --source contact --guardian <guardian> --intake-type <type> --consent-status explicit_reply_ok --proof-note "email thread checked YYYY-MM-DD"
rows.evidence_required: manual command still requires explicit consent, safe scope and proof note policy.

rows.owner_action: Use the demand gate state as the only source for asset or offer priority.

rules: Only real emails or copied structured requests may become real lead rows.
Do not store raw reply email in lead-intake-tracker.csv.
A zero, empty or missing KPI signal is not a commercial decision.
Repeated same-guardian demand must appear before building paid or priority assets.
Emergency, diagnosis, counseling replacement or sensitive personal-data requests stay outside the promotion tracker.
